case_title: SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION VS. LAURA AGUIRRE ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: COMPUTATION OF INTEREST (TRANSACTION ID # 17009017) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 17009017) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE
